pages.text: Every resource in Productive Frogs comes from one loop. A Resource Slime of a given resource is eaten by its matching Frog, which drops a Froglight. Smelt that Froglight and you get the resource back.$(br2)Set the chain up once and it runs in the background while you do other things.

Resource Slimes are the input. Each is tied to one resource - iron, copper, clay, and so on. You get them by priming vanilla slimes, or by farming them with Slime Milk (see the Slimes & Slime Milk chapter).

A Froglight is what a frog drops when it eats its matching slime. Put it in a furnace and it smelts back into the resource. A hopper under the frog collects the drops for you - that is the whole farm.
